Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 283 upvotes, 43 comments
  2. Combinators 64 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Good CTE, Bad CTE 124 upvotes, 28 comments
  4. Do your own writing 663 upvotes, 209 comments
  5. 7,655 Ransomware Claims in One Year: Group, Sector, and Country Breakdown 44 upvotes, 8 comments
  6. How to turn anything into a router 726 upvotes, 252 comments
  7. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1400 upvotes, 536 comments
  8. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 390 upvotes, 140 comments
  9. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 628 upvotes, 244 comments
  10. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 85 upvotes, 25 comments
  11. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 235 upvotes, 89 comments
  12. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 479 upvotes, 236 comments
  13. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 371 upvotes, 184 comments
  14. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 932 upvotes, 503 comments
  15. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. In Expanding de Sitter Space, Quantum Mechanics Gets More Elusive 12 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Artemis II is not safe to fly 610 upvotes, 381 comments
  18. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 440 upvotes, 269 comments
  19. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 33 upvotes, 13 comments
  20. 30 Years Ago, Robots Learned to Walk Without Falling 26 upvotes, 10 comments
  21. Oracle slashes 30k jobs with a cold 6 a.m. email 147 upvotes, 89 comments
  22. We're Pausing Asimov Press 78 upvotes, 46 comments
  23. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 100 upvotes, 66 comments
  24. Multiple Sclerosis 28 upvotes, 14 comments
  25. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 55 upvotes, 40 comments
  26. Android Developer Verification 306 upvotes, 305 comments
  27. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Acceptance of entomophagy among Canadians at an insectarium 9 upvotes, 4 comments
  29. Distributed data centers in our basements 10 upvotes, 19 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
